ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Submitting Proposed Order Denying Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Off Calendar

Petition For Order To Turn Over Funds In Possession Of Trustee And Beneficiaries Of Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust.
Off Calendar May-28-2008 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-22-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance.

The Court adopted the Tentative Ruling: Motion for Summary Judgment and Summary Adjudication is denied. Relief under Probate Code section 850(a)(2)(D) is not supported by the facts or evidence presented.

Comm: Sue Kaplan; Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR #7782, Bailiff: Deputy Guitron; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha

Petition For Order To Turn Over Funds In Possession Of Trustee And Beneficiaries Of Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust.

Petition For Order To Turn Over Funds In Possession Of Trustee And Beneficiaries Of Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust.
Off Calendar Feb-05-2008 Continued To Feb-27-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order To Turn Over Funds In Possession Of Trustee And Beneficiaries Of Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust.
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Continued To Feb-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Cullen for Respondents. Paul Melbostad for and with Loretta Hellen (Executrix).

Mr. Cullen stated that they have talked, and that they have taken depositions. Mr. Melbostad and Mr. Cullen are interested in mediation, but the parties stated that they disagree on the issue regarding the real estate compensation obligation of Ms. Helen to Kramer Realtor. Mr. Cullen stated that there were many disputes and requested the matter be set for trial or mediation. Mr. Melbostad expressed that the matter cannot settle unless $123,000.00 is released from escrow. Mr. Melbostad will file a Motion for Summary Judgment.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Rich Lee.

Demurrer To The Petn. For Order To Turn Over Funds In Possession Of Trustee And Beneficiaries Of Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust; Memo. Of Points And Auth. & Declaration Of John J. Cullen; & Req. For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Aug-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PAUL MELBOSTAD, APPEARING FOR L. HELLEN; JOHN J. CULLEN, APPEARING FOR PEITIONER, ALSO APPEARING BURTON MCGOVERN

MR. MELBOSTAD STATES THAT HE WULD LKIE A 850 PETITION FILED AND THAT THE PROPERTY WAS OBTAINED BY FRAUD. MR. CULLEN STATED THAT RHE RESPONSE DID NOT ADDRESS THE DEMURRER AND THERE IS AN ATEMPT TO ATTACK MR MCGOVERN CHARATER. THIS MATTER WAS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.

JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN;REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN, CSR#11722; CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON;BALIFF:M.LOOS
